content.query:
-------------------------------

--- Dim Customer --------------

IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT *
    FROM sys.tables t
    JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
    WHERE t.name = 'DimCustomer' AND s.name = 'gold_schema'
)
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_schema.DimCustomer 
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'DimCustomer',
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
)
AS
 SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CustomerID) AS DimCustomerKey
 FROM
(
SELECT
DISTINCT
    CustomerID,
    CustomerEmail,
    CustomerName,
    Domain,
    First_Name
    FROM silver_schema.silverTable 
    )
    t

---------------------------------------

--- Dim Product ----------------------
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * from sys.tables t join sys.schemas s on t.schema_id = s.schema_id where t.name='DimProduct' AND s.name='gold_schema')
    CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_schema.DimProduct 
    WITH 
    (
        LOCATION = 'DimProduct',
        DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
        FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
    )
    AS
     SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ProductID) AS DimProductKey
    FROM
    (
    SELECT 
    DISTINCT
    ProductID,
    ProductName,
    ProductCategory
    FROM silver_schema.silverTable
    ) t

------------------------------

-- Dim Geopgraphy ------------

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * from sys.tables t join sys.schemas s on t.schema_id = s.schema_id where t.name='DimGeography' AND s.name='gold_schema')
    CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_schema.DimGeography
    WITH 
    (
        LOCATION = 'DimGeography',
        DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
        FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
    )
    AS
     SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RegionID) AS DimGeographyKey
           FROM
    (
        SELECT 
    DISTINCT
    RegionID,
    RegionName,
    Country
    FROM silver_schema.silverTable
    ) t


------------------------------------

--- Dim Orders ---------------------

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * from sys.tables t join sys.schemas s on t.schema_id = s.schema_id where t.name='DimOrders' AND s.name='gold_schema')
    CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_schema.DimOrders
    WITH 
    (
        LOCATION = 'DimOrders',
        DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
        FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
    )
    AS
    SELECT 
    OrderID,
    OrderDate,
    CustomerID,
    CustomerName,
    CustomerEmail,
    Domain,
    First_Name,
    ProductID,
    ProductName,
    ProductCategory,
    RegionID,
    RegionName,
    Country,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY OrderID) AS DimOrdersKey
    FROM silver_schema.silverTable
